Kamisha Walker has 5 years of formal daycare experience, is located in Glendale/Phoenix Arizona with 30-mile travel radius, and is available full-time with morning/evening preference. She gave a detailed, professional conflict resolution story showing maturity and strong classroom management skills. Meets Arizona's strict 6-month formal requirement with extensive daycare background.
